comment.body:
OD currently has a promotion where you can lock in ProMax for 195USD a month for life (as long as you not cancel). Maybe somebody wants to take advantage of it. They say there is total 50 spots. I recently watched their video where they explain how to read the heatmap. I found it useful. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b4Vpqa0zgYs
They first go through some basics and then the major greeks, so depending on your knowledge one can skip the earlier parts. I watched it in 1.25x speed which was easy to follow.
